college_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT), Sri City, Chittoor
category_or_quota: All categories; published Semester I fee schedule
notes: Official first-year total is ₹500,000 including ₹20,000 refundable caution deposit. Four-year total is a calculated straight-line estimate using current tuition, hostel, mess and ₹3,000 annual medical/insurance, plus one-time admission and alumni fees. Official page warns fees may be revised from second year onward; personal costs are excluded.
